description_long: This house is a large, modern multi-story residence with a flat roof that features a rooftop pool and multiple outdoor terraces. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, some clad in light-colored brick and others in dark paneling, creating a striking contrast. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views. The property includes a driveway with parked cars, landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, and a detached glass greenhouse. Outdoor staircases and railings connect the various levels and terraces, enhancing the sense of verticality and openness. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, open spaces, and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with a rooftop pool, terraces, and a mix of light brick and dark panel exteriors, featuring large windows and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main house with rooftop pool, terraces, and a detached structure to the left, with landscaping and trees visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the driveway with two cars, the main entrance, and the greenhouse on the left, as well as the rooftop pool and multiple terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals more of the brick facade, additional windows, and the detached structure on the right, with visible landscaping and a car.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the dark panel sections, the greenhouse on the right, and the stepped terraces leading up to the rooftop pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps, and a covered porch area with adjacent landscaping and driveway access.
